title: Ancient Style Golden Glance Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Ancient Style Golden Glance Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: 9:16 vertical high-precision ancient Chinese xianxia refined portrait of an adult East Asian woman, 25, with refined pale features, phoenix eyes, cool quiet gaze, and slightly parted lips. She is lightly running through a warm palace lantern corridor, body back-facing and side-back toward the camera, turning her head over her shoulder to look at the lens. Long black half-up hair, flowing shawl, large sleeves, and skirt lifted by gentle wind. costume: ivory white robe with red edge ribbons, gold embroidery, pearl tassels, golden crown. motion pose: running lightly through palace corridor, back to camera, turning head toward lens, sleeves and shawl flying. Scene: softly blurred palace corridor, columns, railings, warm lantern bokeh, deep space. Warm golden soft light, visible hair rim light, bright transparent dreamy high-end xianxia heroine poster quality. Adult only, no text, no watermark, no copied character, no distorted limbs. adult finish: dreamy bright Tang fantasy xianxia poster, flowing fabric and hair rim light. subject: adult East Asian woman, 25, refined pale face, phoenix eyes, cool quiet gaze. corridor scene: warm palace lantern corridor with columns, railings, golden bokeh.
